name: deepsyte
description: DeepSyte browser automation, screenshots, audits, and visual testing through the OAuth-protected MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Website-authenticated screenshots and browser tools for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use DeepSyte to capture screenshots, automate browser sessions, verify visual changes, and run website audits from Codex. Setup opens DeepSyte website OAuth before MCP tools can run; raw API keys are not accepted for MCP access.
defaultPrompt: Use DeepSyte to take a screenshot of https://deepsyte.com and summarize what renders.
Use DeepSyte to verify a website change with browser automation.
Use DeepSyte to run a quick SEO and accessibility check for this page.
